parsed_review.summary: Claude Code Opus 4.8 max read-only review reported no P0 or P1 findings. It reported one P2 discrepancy about weighted title disposition set membership; local adjudication verified the finding was based on a misread because S05 is in alignedWithWeightedLedgerSubphases, not contractTitleAuthoritativeSubphases. Two P3 test-symmetry observations were fixed by adding numeric, object, tab, and newline invalid-status unit assertions.

findings.title: Disposition status vs authoritative-set membership
findings.disposition: Rejected after local verification. S05 appears in alignedWithWeightedLedgerSubphases, not contractTitleAuthoritativeSubphases, and the contract item records aligned_with_weighted_ledger. The strict validator agrees with this placement; no contract change is required.

findings.title: Numeric and object invalid status cases are only validator-covered
findings.disposition: Added unit assertions that validateControlPlaneStateEnumRegistryStatus rejects numeric and object inputs.

findings.title: Tab and newline stored-whitespace status cases are not explicit in unit tests
findings.disposition: Added unit assertions that tab-prefixed and newline-suffixed stored statuses are rejected by the stored-whitespace guard.
